# PitchRank
> Data-powered youth soccer team rankings and performance analytics

## About
PitchRank provides the most accurate youth soccer rankings in the United States, covering U10-U19 boys and girls teams across all 50 states. Rankings are updated weekly based on game results from sanctioned leagues and tournaments.

## Core Content
- [Methodology](https://www.pitchrank.io/methodology): How PitchRank calculates rankings
- [National Rankings](https://www.pitchrank.io/rankings): Top youth soccer teams across the United States
- [About PitchRank](https://www.pitchrank.io/authors/pitchrank-team): The team behind the rankings

## Blog
*State-specific guides are listed under State Pillars below.*

- [Best U13 Soccer Teams: This Week's Rankings](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/2026-06-29-best-u13-soccer-teams): Best U13 soccer teams this week. Rankings for 87,973 teams updated every Monday.
- [State of Texas Youth Soccer 2026](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/state-of-texas-youth-soccer-2026): PitchRank's first-party Texas youth soccer report: 7,992 ranked teams across 18 groups, drawn from 117,747 matches over the past year — biggest movers, league parity, and age-group depth.
- [Connecticut Youth Soccer Rankings: This Week's Top Movers](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/2026-06-22-connecticut-youth-soccer-rankings): This week's CT youth soccer rankings update. See which CT teams moved the most across 90,413 ranked teams.
- [Massachusetts Youth Soccer Rankings: This Week's Top Movers](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/2026-06-15-massachusetts-youth-soccer-rankings): This week's MA youth soccer rankings update. See which MA teams moved the most across 92,331 ranked teams.
- [Best Youth Soccer Ranking Websites for Parents (2026)](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/best-youth-soccer-ranking-websites-2026): An honest comparison of youth soccer ranking sites — PitchRank, GotSport, SoccerWire, USARank, and TopDrawerSoccer. What each one does, how they work, and which is right for your family.
- [Youth Soccer Levels Explained: ECNL, MLS NEXT, NPL](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/youth-soccer-levels-explained): ECNL, MLS NEXT, NPL, GA, National League — what every US youth soccer level actually means for your kid. Plain English, no jargon.
- [PA U10 Boys Soccer Rankings 2026: Top 25 Teams in Pennsylvania](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/pa-u10-boys-soccer-rankings): The top 25 U10 boys soccer teams in Pennsylvania, ranked by PowerScore. FC DELCO, Philadelphia Union SWAG, Pittsburgh Riverhounds — see where your team stands.
- [Youth Soccer Tryouts 2026: A Data-Driven Guide for Parents](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/youth-soccer-tryouts-2026): Youth soccer tryouts are changing in 2026 with new age groups. Learn what to look for, how to evaluate clubs with data, and when to switch.
- [Youth Soccer Age Group Changes for 2026-2027: What Every Parent Needs to Know](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/youth-soccer-age-group-change-2026-2027): Youth soccer is switching from birth-year to school-year age groups starting fall 2026. Here's exactly how it works, who it affects, and what to do before tryouts.
- [What is PowerScore in Youth Soccer? The Complete Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/what-is-powerscore-youth-soccer): PowerScore is PitchRank's 0–1 team strength rating: 13 layers, 50% strength of schedule, updated weekly. Here's how it works and how to read your team's number.
- [What Predicts Winning Better Than Goals Scored? We Analyzed 700,000+ Youth Soccer Games to Find Out](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/what-predicts-winning-beyond-goals): Goals scored alone predict only 47% of outcomes — barely better than a coin flip. After analyzing 700,000+ youth soccer games, we found the real predictors of team quality. The answer might surprise you.
- [Youth Soccer Rankings by State: Complete Guide for 2026](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/youth-soccer-rankings-by-state): Find youth soccer team rankings in every state. The only platform with comprehensive 50-state rankings powered by a 13-layer algorithm. California, Texas, Florida, and more.
- [Youth Soccer Rankings Explained: A Parent's Guide to Understanding Your Team's Position](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/youth-soccer-rankings-explained): Confused by youth soccer rankings? This guide breaks down how different ranking systems work, what your team's ranking actually means, and which systems parents should trust.
- [Youth Soccer Rankings: The Complete Guide for Parents](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/youth-soccer-rankings-complete-guide): Everything parents need to know about youth soccer rankings—what they are, how they work, and why they matter for your child's development and club selection.
- [How PitchRank Rankings Work](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/how-pitchrank-rankings-work): Discover the algorithm methodology behind PitchRank's youth soccer rankings and why our power scores are more accurate than traditional ranking systems.

## State Pillars
- [Arizona Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/arizona-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Confused about Arizona soccer rankings? Here's what every parent needs to know about youth soccer team rankings in AZ, from Phoenix to Tucson.
- [California Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/california-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your California club ranks among 15,693 teams. LA Galaxy, San Diego Surf, Beach FC, Sacramento Republic and more — rated weekly by PowerScore. Free.
- [Colorado Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/colorado-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your Colorado club ranks. Rapids Youth, Real Colorado, Colorado Storm and more — rated by PowerScore from real game results. Free rankings updated every Monday.
- [Connecticut Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/connecticut-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your CT youth soccer club ranks among 1,500+ teams. CT Rush, CFC North, Inter Connecticut FC, Beachside, Oakwood, Connecticut FC and more — rated weekly by PowerScore. Free.
- [Florida Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/florida-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Florida has 5,300+ ranked youth soccer teams — 3rd most in the country. Here's what every parent needs to know about rankings, from Miami to Jacksonville.
- [Georgia Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/georgia-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your GA youth soccer club ranks among 789 teams. Concorde Fire, UFA, NASA Tophat, Southern Soccer Academy, Gwinnett SA and more — rated weekly by PowerScore. Free.
- [Illinois Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/illinois-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your IL youth soccer club ranks among 1,284 teams. Sockers FC, Metro Alliance, Chicago Fire Youth, Central Illinois United and more — rated weekly by PowerScore. Free.
- [Indiana Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/indiana-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your IN youth soccer club ranks among 950+ teams. Indy Premier SC, Indy Eleven Academy, FC Pride, Carmel FC, Fort Wayne United and more — rated weekly by PowerScore. Free.
- [Massachusetts Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/massachusetts-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your MA youth soccer club ranks among 1,500+ teams. NEFC, FC Stars, IFA, Select, FC Boston Bolts and more — rated weekly by PowerScore. Free.
- [Maryland Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/maryland-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your MD youth soccer club ranks among 1,500+ teams. Bethesda SC, Coppermine, Maryland United, Pipeline and more — rated weekly by PowerScore. Free.
- [Michigan Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/michigan-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your Michigan club ranks among thousands of teams. Michigan Hawks, Vardar, DCFC and more — rated by PowerScore from real game results. Free rankings updated every Monday.
- [Minnesota Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/minnesota-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your MN youth soccer club ranks among 2,200+ teams. Minnesota Rush, Salvo SC, Fusion, North Star FC, Minneapolis United, MN Thunder Academy, St. Croix and more — rated weekly by PowerScore. Free.
- [Missouri Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/missouri-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your MO youth soccer club ranks among 1,100+ teams. St. Louis Scott Gallagher, Lou Fusz Athletic, Missouri Rush, St. Louis CITY SC, SEMO Elite and more — rated weekly by PowerScore. Free.
- [New Jersey Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/new-jersey-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your NJ youth soccer club ranks among 5,000+ teams. PDA, STA, Match Fit Academy, FC Copa and more — rated weekly by PowerScore. Free.
- [New York Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/new-york-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your NY youth soccer club ranks among 3,600+ teams. Manhattan SC, SUSA FC, WNY Flash, Long Island SC and more — rated weekly by PowerScore. Free.
- [North Carolina Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/north-carolina-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your NC youth soccer club ranks among 2,600+ teams. Charlotte SA, NCFC, Wake FC, NC Fusion and more — rated weekly by PowerScore. Free.
- [Ohio Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/ohio-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your OH youth soccer club ranks among 2,650 teams. Cincinnati United Premier, Club Ohio, Columbus Force, Cleveland Force and more — rated weekly by PowerScore. Free.
- [Pennsylvania Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/pennsylvania-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Pennsylvania youth soccer rankings guide: EDP, EPYSA explained. See where PA clubs rank by PowerScore. Updated weekly. Free for parents.
- [Texas Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/texas-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your Texas club ranks among 9,457 teams. FC Dallas, Solar SC, and more — rated weekly by PowerScore from real game results. Free.
- [Virginia Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/virginia-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your VA youth soccer club ranks among 1,500+ teams. Beach FC, Richmond United, Arlington Soccer, Loudoun and more — rated weekly by PowerScore. Free.
- [Washington Youth Soccer Rankings Guide](https://www.pitchrank.io/blog/washington-youth-soccer-rankings-guide): Find where your WA youth soccer club ranks among 1,500+ teams. Eastside FC, Seattle United, Crossfire Premier, Seattle Celtic, Pacific Northwest SC and more — rated weekly by PowerScore. Free.
